result.reason: The user is requesting a new feature: the ability to autostart a specific connection and then automatically close mRemoteNG when that connection is closed.
result.approach: Implement command-line argument parsing to specify a connection for autostart. Modify application logic to open the specified connection on startup and to monitor its state. When the autostarted connection disconnects, trigger the mRemoteNG application to close.
